default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on client progress and reallocate tasks due to a team member's absence.](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Kavishka's Absence:** Due to a family emergency, Kavishka is out. Hassan will complete urgent tasks for Field Guide today, and Lawrence will take over article generation for Enable and SpecterOps to maintain momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [**Client Strategy Presentations:** Aida is presenting strategies to U.com and Fleet Device Management today. She will also present the content OS to Enable and Bubble.](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [**Enable Gated Content:** Aida proposed repurposing a client report into a gated PDF. GrowthX can write the content; client design support is needed, or GrowthX can provide it with a 2–3 week lead time.](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [**Bubble Content Generation:** Tamara will begin generating articles this week, prioritizing high-volume, top-of-funnel topics. The first draft is due Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)

## Topics

### Team & Task Reallocation

  - [Kavishka is out due to a family emergency, requiring immediate task reallocation.](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [**Hassan:**](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
      - [**Priority:** Complete Field Guide tasks by EOD today.](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
          - [Set up competitor docs in Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
          - [Add keyword gap analysis URL tabs in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [**Lawrence:**](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [**Priority:** Generate calibration articles for SpecterOps and Enable by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
          - [**SpecterOps:** Use the existing agentic pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
          - [**Enable:** A new agentic pipeline must be set up first.](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
      - [**Future Role:** Will become the managing editor for Remkis in week 8.](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)

### Client Updates

  - [**Field Guide:** Hassan to complete competitor docs and keyword analysis today to support Aida's strategy work next week.](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [**U.com & Fleet Device Management:** Aida to present strategies today.](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [**Specter Ops:** Kavishka completed keyword research and uploaded assignments to the content OS. Aida will review assignments before tomorrow's sync.](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

      - [**Gated Content Proposal:** Repurpose a client report into a \~2,000-word gated PDF.](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
          - [**Action:** Aida to offer writing services. Client design support is needed, or GrowthX can provide it with a 2–3 week lead time.](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
      - [**Writing Guidelines:** The client's AI style guide will be merged into guidelines after their internal review (expected today/tomorrow).](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)

  - [**Base 10:**](https://fathom.video/share/mT8y9BY-BykTPz9GZiUnbXxaoJQiP6nK?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
